content.query:
SELECT 
[id] as LeadFormID
,[_account_id] as AccountID
,[name] as LeadFormName
,[status] as Status
,[is_optimized_for_quality] as IsOptimizedForQuality
,[created_time] as CreatedTime
,[leads_count] as LeadsCount
,[expired_leads_count] as ExpiredLeadsCount
,[organic_leads_count] as OrganicLeadsCount
,[follow_up_action_url] as FollowUpActionURL
,[page_id] as PageID
,[page_name] as PageName
,[locale] as Locale
,[context_card_id] as ContextCardID
,[context_card_style] as ContextCardStyle
,[context_card_title] as ContextCardTitle
,[context_card_cover_photo_id] as ContextCardCoverPhotoID
,[context_card_cover_photo_created_time] as ContextCardCoverPhotoCreatedTime
,[allow_organic_lead] as AllowOrganicLead
,[block_display_for_non_targeted_viewer] as BlockDisplayForNonTargetedViewer
,[context_card_button_text] as ContextCardButtonText
,[context_card_content] as ContextCardContent
,[legal_content_id] as LegalContentID
,[legal_content_privacy_policy_url] as LegalContentPrivacyPolicyURL
,[legal_content_privacy_policy_link_text] as LegalContentPrivacyPolicyLinkText
,[legal_content_custom_disclaimer_body_text] as LegalContentCustomDisclaimerBodyText
,[legal_content_custom_disclaimer_body_url_entities] as LegalContentCustomDisclaimerBodyURLEntities
,[privacy_policy_url] as PrivacyPolicyURL
,[question_page_custom_headline] as QuestionPageCustomHeadline
,[questions] as Questions
,[thank_you_page_body] as ThankYouPageBody
,[thank_you_page_button_text] as ThankYouPageButtonText
,[thank_you_page_button_type] as ThankYouPageButtonType
,[thank_you_page_enable_messenger] as ThankYouPageEnableMessenger
,[thank_you_page_id] as ThankYouPageID
,[thank_you_page_title] as ThankYouPageTitle
,[thank_you_page_website_url] as ThankYouPageWebsiteURL
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_ad_leads_forms]
